extra.reason: Mechanical AppKit deprecations replaced with modern APIs; WebView/DOM + flush-window deferred to macdown-8tk.5, C prototypes to macdown-8tk.2, drag-and-drop fixes to macdown-8tk.10.
Added MPRenderer markdown->HTML characterization suite (MPRendererTests.m, 19 tests; full suite 39 passing). Editor-side autocomplete tests split to macdown-6st.

WKWebView scaffolding + macdown-asset scheme handler + navigation landed and verified (CSS, Prism, mermaid, MathJax, relative images, tables render; editorOnRight + link-cancel review fixes confirmed). Later stages tracked by sibling beads; drop-prevention .5.6 and off-main-thread reads .5.7 filed from review.
Implemented in PR #4 review round 1: decidePolicyForNavigationAction cancels unexpected main-frame navigations (non-asset-scheme, non about:blank), blocking file/text drops into the preview.
Implemented in PR #4 review round 1: MPAssetSchemeHandler now reads off the main thread (global queue) and replies on the main queue, guarded by liveTasks.

MathJax typeset-complete wired through WKScriptMessageHandler (weak wrapper, exactly-once via per-load generation/flag, reset at didStartProvisional, -close teardown). init.js posts mathJaxEnd. Stock CDN MathJax 2.7.3 fires 'End', so the #548 bundled-patch workaround is unneeded. Runtime-verified exactly-once; 45 tests pass.

Ported DOMNode+Text walk to injected JS (Intl.Segmenter, PRE>CODE=0/inline-code=1 preserved, runtime-verified words=4/chars=32/noSpace=29); updateWordCount async via evaluateJavaScript; cached body background color refreshed on load, redrawDivider reads cache. Local code-review fixes (weak-self) applied. 45/45 tests pass.
Scroll-sync rebuilt for WKWebView (async metrics + window.scrollTo); runtime-verified bidirectional tracking

Not reproducible under lldb or Xcode; all 78 bundled PNGs verified clean (pngcheck + sips); no loose PNGs in bundle. ImageIO debugger-only diagnostic, invisible to users, likely a legacy-WebView image load removed by the WKWebView migration. Recurrence recipe documented in notes.
Fixed in batch PR (transparent-divider normalization + stale Terminal-prefs outlet removal)
Fixed in batch PR (transparent-divider normalization + stale Terminal-prefs outlet removal)
copyFiles now treats a 0-byte data-dir style/theme like a missing one and replaces it with the bundled default (won't clobber non-empty user edits)

Replaced node-sass+primer-markdown@4 generator with a curl/github-markdown-css script + committed CSS; dropped the Transpile Styles build phase. Plus copyFiles empty-file self-heal (112) and Browser-default label.

Fixed Settings/Preferences window layout under modern AppKit: toolbar overflow (NSWindowToolbarStylePreference), Rendering pane control overlap + Graphviz/Mermaid alignment/spacing, pane width, and renamed window to 'Settings'. Follow-up localization refresh tracked separately.

Implemented 3-level local-file access scope (document subtree / +parent / any file) honored by the asset-scheme gate, plus file:// body-URL rewriting to macdown-asset. Shipped on revival/wkwebview-local-asset-scope.
Added (void) to 13 empty C parameter lists across MacDown sources and vendored pmh parser (source pmh_parser_head.c, not the generated pmh_parser.c). Build clean, zero strict-prototype warnings.
Added CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY = "-" (ad-hoc) to both MacDownTests configs. Clean 'xcodebuild test' now signs the bundle and passes all 53 tests with no CLI override.

Deleted dead legacy-WebView code: DOMNode+Text.{h,m}, WebView+WebViewPrivateHeaders.h, MPMathJaxListener.{h,m} (all zero call sites), their 14 pbxproj entries, and the #if 0 DOMDocument/DOMNode block in MPDocument.m. Clean build, 53/53 tests pass, zero compiled legacy WebView references. DEVIATIONS from bead text (verified against code): kMPMathJaxCDN is KEPT (still loads MathJax from CDN in mathjaxScripts); the JavaScriptCore import is KEPT (active JSContext use in MPUtilities.m) -- neither is 'unused'; the 'WebView (Shortcut) category' and 'Web*Delegate conformances' don't exist (already removed in earlier stages); the MathJax redirect was already gone. Zoom/print unaffected -- both run through self.preview (WKWebView) APIs untouched here.

Fixed the 3 documented reference-node asymmetries (setext H1 match, setext anchor from heading-text line, preview p>img:only-child); high-effort review applied (homogeneous-run regex ^(=+|-+)$, single-source isDashLine, exact-string render tests). Build clean, 57/57 tests. Runtime mixed-fixture scroll verification to be done by Stuart before merging the PR. Deeper pre-existing editor-regex vs hoedown-block-parser divergences tracked in macdown-y9j.

WKWebView migration complete: all stages (1-6) and child bugs closed. Preview runs entirely on WKWebView, legacy WebView/DOM code deleted (8tk.5.5), scroll-sync rebuilt and the reference-node asymmetry fixed (4y8, PR #12, runtime-verified). Remaining scroll-sync edge cases tracked in macdown-y9j.

GitHub Actions CI added (.github/workflows/ci.yml): builds + tests on latest-stable Xcode / macos-latest, on push to master, PRs, and manual dispatch. Verified green on PR #13's own run (all steps pass). Handles submodules, CocoaPods-via-Bundler, the pmh_parser.c make step, and headless ad-hoc-signed tests. Replaces the defunct Travis config.
Added (void) to the two empty parameter lists in macdown-cmd/main.m (MPRunningMacDownInstance, MPPipedData). Build clean, no -Wstrict-prototypes warnings remain.
Swift enabled (SWIFT_VERSION 5.0 + bridging header); exercised both directions by the print-margin code.
Margins clamped to imageable area + preferences + Print pane; MacDown print stylesheet for page breaks; interactive-print WKPrintingView fix. Follow-ups: macdown-evb, macdown-wh6.

Added MPPrintMarginSynchronizer: re-clamps the operation's margins when the imageable area changes mid-print-session, observing paperSize/orientation/printer (PR #15). Testing reframed the bead's premise: on current macOS paper size & orientation are changed via Page Setup, NOT the print panel, and that path is already handled by -printInfo (verified — landscape correctly down-caps top/bottom). So the synchronizer's live in-panel trigger is the destination-printer change; paperSize/orientation observation is kept as defensive cover for systems/drivers that expose them. Strictly additive (left/right always re-clamp; top/bottom re-clamp unless WebKit restores cached values, in which case it matches pre-PR behavior — never a regression). Comments/scope reframed accordingly. Kept per owner's call; revisit if printer-change handling ever causes trouble.
Locale-aware margin unit (inches/centimetres) via MPMarginUnit Swift helper; pane derives header, suffix, and conversion factor from it.

Added MPAutocompleteTests.m: 21 characterization tests pinning current behaviour of list/blockquote/indent continuation (completeNextListItem/BlockquoteLine/IndentedLine) and indentation (insertSpacesForTab, unindentForSpacesBefore, indent/unindentSelectedLines).

Extended MPAutocompleteTests.m with 23 tests: auto-pairing (incl. smart-quote branch), insert/wrap dispatcher, selection wrapping + strikethrough, deleteMatchingCharactersAround, substringInRange:isSurroundedBy emphasis/strong special-casing, markup + block toggles, makeHeader (add/replace/strip), insertMappedContent guard paths.
Phase 1: MacDownKit local SPM package stood up and linked from app target; two leaf categories moved in; build + 114 tests green.
hoedown 3.0.7 vendored as local SPM package (Packages/Hoedown), hoedown pod removed; app builds + 114 tests green; de-pod template established for LibYAML and the rest of 8tk.7.
